name: @metaharness/aws-finops
description: Darwin FinOps harness (ADR-168): the Darwin Shield primitives — multi-tier cascade, deterministic execution oracle, shrinking residual — applied to AWS cost optimization. Swaps the security oracle (semgrep + crash-fuzzer) for a cost oracle (infracost + checkov + terraform validate/plan). Frozen $0.04 Qwen models propose Terraform patches; a deterministic oracle proves the modeled bill drops without breaking the build or compliance; only verified savings are reported, behind a human review gate. Dependency-free core (Node built-ins); binaries optional/skip-when-absent.
author: rUv <ruv@ruv.net>
